title: Feedback - send a Compliment feedback with names/email
scenario: Sending a compliment feedback with name and email from App Settings > Feedback > Compliment fails to attach sender details
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or your profile avatar to access the side navigation.
Select 'App Settings' from the navigation menu.
Tap on the 'Compliment' tab or option.
Enter a compliment message in the text field.
Enter your name in the 'Name' field.
Enter your email address in the 'Email' field.
expected: Feedback is sent successfully with the name and email attached. A confirmation message appears indicating the compliment was submitted.
